_meta.why: Defines the per-turn execution pipeline. Each stage has a condition, execution order, latency budget, and failure strategy.

pipeline.name: rpm_guard
pipeline.why: Must be first. A rejected request here costs zero NIM RPM.

pipeline.name: credential_scrub
pipeline.why: Must run before any content reaches NIM. Regex-only, negligible latency.

pipeline.name: profile_selector
pipeline.why: Classify task and set parameters before NIM call. No-op if classification fails — defaults apply.

pipeline.name: context_budget_enforcer
pipeline.why: Must run after profile_selector so task_class is available. Prevents NIM timeout from context overflow.

pipeline.name: nim_inference
pipeline.why: The actual NIM call. Latency budget is 30s; Free Tier shared infra can spike to 15–25s on heavy load.

pipeline.name: response_quality_monitor
pipeline.why: Outlet-only. Attaches quality metadata to body for benchmark consumption. Never modifies visible response.

rpm_accounting.why: Only NIM inference calls count against the 32 RPM budget. Memory and RAG are local operations.
